mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_gremlin_query_history (user_id, connection_id, query_text, mode, success, error_message, cost_ms, result_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{connectionId}, #{queryText}, #{mode}, #{success}, #{errorMessage}, #{costMs}, #{resultCount})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_gremlin_query_history WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
DELETE FROM sys_gremlin_query_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND connection_id = #{connectionId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, query_text, description, mode, sort_order, create_time, update_time FROM sys_gremlin_query_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_gremlin_query_favorite (user_id, title, query_text, description, mode, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{queryText}, #{description}, #{mode}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_gremlin_query_favorite WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
